entries.summary: WatchTower core helper and harness workspace.
entries.synopsis: uv run watchtower-core [-h] <command> ...

entries.summary: Run a small, low-risk workspace health snapshot that confirms the core Python CLI is installed and that the main governed lookup surfaces load successfully.
entries.synopsis: uv run watchtower-core doctor [-h] [--format {human,json}]
entries.notes: Current behavior is a minimal scaffold-level smoke check with no mutation.

entries.summary: Inspect hosted pack registry entries, scaffold new hosted packs, bootstrap shared registry and workspace wiring, and validate pack-interface contracts against the governed pack registry plus runtime manifest.
entries.synopsis: uv run watchtower-core pack [-h] <pack_command> ...

entries.summary: Validate one staged engineering shared-core extract and apply its core/ tree into the current repository while preserving local developer residue such as .venv and cache directories.
entries.synopsis: uv run watchtower-core pack apply-core [-h] --source-root SOURCE_ROOT [--write] [--format {human,json}]

entries.summary: Register one hosted pack into the shared pack registry and the shared core/python workspace so the host can load it through the normal pack contract. Use replace-hosted-packs mode when a copied core/ snapshot still carries donor hosted-pack wiring that should be scrubbed before the recipient pack is reloaded. Use sync-extra when the recipient workspace should also install optional groups such as dev during the same bootstrap pass.
entries.synopsis: uv run watchtower-core pack bootstrap [-h] --pack-settings-path PACK_SETTINGS_PATH [--write] [--no-sync-workspace] [--sync-extra SYNC_EXTRA] [--replace-hosted-packs] [--format {human,json}]

entries.summary: Describe one hosted pack using the shared pack registry plus the pack-owned runtime manifest.
entries.synopsis: uv run watchtower-core pack describe [-h] [--pack PACK] [--format {human,json}]

entries.summary: Copy a curated customer-safe staged export. By default the command stages shared core plus the selected hosted-pack roots, reconciles shared registry and workspace metadata to the selected pack set, and validates the staged result against the hosted-pack and portability contracts.
entries.synopsis: uv run watchtower-core pack export [-h] --output-root OUTPUT_ROOT [--include-pack INCLUDE_PACK] [--pack-only] [--overwrite] [--format {human,json}]

entries.summary: Copy only shared core into one staging directory, scrub donor pack wiring and donor-only retained artifacts, and validate the result against the engineering-core portability contract.
entries.synopsis: uv run watchtower-core pack extract-core [-h] --output-root OUTPUT_ROOT [--overwrite] [--format {human,json}]

entries.summary: List the hosted packs declared in the shared pack registry.
entries.synopsis: uv run watchtower-core pack list [-h] [--format {human,json}]

entries.summary: Render the pack-owned starter files for one new hosted pack without mutating the shared pack registry or core workspace dependency graph.
entries.synopsis: uv run watchtower-core pack scaffold [-h] --pack-slug PACK_SLUG --pack-root PACK_ROOT [--command-namespace COMMAND_NAMESPACE] [--python-distribution PYTHON_DISTRIBUTION] [--python-package PYTHON_PACKAGE] [--domain-root DOMAIN_ROOT] [--format {human,json}]

entries.summary: Validate one hosted pack contract using the pack registry, runtime manifest, and typed integration descriptor checks.
entries.synopsis: uv run watchtower-core pack validate [-h] [--pack PACK] [--pack-settings-path PACK_SETTINGS_PATH] [--format {human,json}]

entries.summary: Bootstrap live initiative packages, inspect live plan state, and advance initiative readiness through the captured-input and approval gates.
entries.synopsis: uv run watchtower-core plan [-h] <plan_command> ...

entries.summary: Approve one validated live initiative package into ready_for_execution so task transitions can begin real execution without violating the hard no-start gate.
entries.synopsis: uv run watchtower-core plan approve [-h] --initiative-slug INITIATIVE_SLUG [--project-slug PROJECT_SLUG] [--actor-id ACTOR_ID] [--write] [--format {human,json}]

entries.summary: Bootstrap one live initiative package rooted under `plan/**`.
entries.synopsis: uv run watchtower-core plan bootstrap [-h] --trace-id TRACE_ID [--initiative-slug INITIATIVE_SLUG] [--project-slug PROJECT_SLUG] --title TITLE --summary SUMMARY [--owner OWNER] [--include-decision] [--governing-doc GOVERNING_DOC] [--task-id TASK_ID] [--task-owner TASK_OWNER] [--task-kind {feature,bug,chore,documentation,governance,research,validation}] [--task-priority {critical,high,medium,low}] [--updated-at UPDATED_AT] [--write] [--format {human,json}]

entries.summary: Apply terminal closeout state to live plan initiative packages, or close one retained trace record after live work is already promoted or otherwise retired from the active workspace.
entries.synopsis: uv run watchtower-core plan closeout [-h] <closeout_command> ...

entries.summary: Set terminal closeout state for one pack-wide or project-scoped live initiative package under `plan/**` and refresh the derived plan indexes plus rendered views that surface active and recent closeouts.
entries.synopsis: uv run watchtower-core plan closeout initiative [-h] --initiative-slug INITIATIVE_SLUG [--project-slug PROJECT_SLUG] --initiative-status {completed,superseded,cancelled} --closure-reason CLOSURE_REASON [--superseded-by-trace-id SUPERSEDED_BY_TRACE_ID] [--closed-at CLOSED_AT] [--write] [--format {human,json}]

entries.summary: Set terminal closeout state for one retained trace record and, in write mode, persist it to the traceability index plus the derived initiative and coordination surfaces that still mirror retained trace state.
entries.synopsis: uv run watchtower-core plan closeout retained-initiative [-h] --trace-id TRACE_ID --initiative-status {completed,superseded,cancelled,abandoned} --closure-reason CLOSURE_REASON [--superseded-by-trace-id SUPERSEDED_BY_TRACE_ID] [--closed-at CLOSED_AT] [--allow-open-tasks] [--allow-acceptance-issues] [--write] [--format {human,json}]

entries.summary: Confirm the current initiative-authored inputs into machine state after review so the readiness gate reflects the latest captured package before execution approval.
entries.synopsis: uv run watchtower-core plan confirm-inputs [-h] --initiative-slug INITIATIVE_SLUG [--project-slug PROJECT_SLUG] [--actor-id ACTOR_ID] [--write] [--format {human,json}]

entries.summary: Search the plan-owned machine lookup surfaces without opening the raw JSON artifacts directly.
entries.synopsis: uv run watchtower-core plan query [-h] <plan_query_command> ...

entries.summary: Search the cross-family plan artifact index for live machine artifacts and aggregate indexes.
entries.synopsis: uv run watchtower-core plan query artifacts [-h] [--query QUERY] [--artifact-id ARTIFACT_ID] [--artifact-family ARTIFACT_FAMILY] [--context-id CONTEXT_ID] [--source-context SOURCE_CONTEXT] [--source-channel SOURCE_CHANNEL] [--status STATUS] [--authoritative {true,false}] [--derived {true,false}] [--hidden {true,false}] [--limit LIMIT] [--format {human,json}]

entries.summary: Search the authored authority map for canonical planning and governance surfaces, preferred commands, and documented fallback paths.
entries.synopsis: uv run watchtower-core plan query authority [-h] [--query QUERY] [--question-id QUESTION_ID] [--domain {planning,governance}] [--artifact-kind ARTIFACT_KIND] [--limit LIMIT] [--format {human,json}]

entries.summary: Search the live closeout index for initiative-local closeout contracts and terminal recap state.
entries.synopsis: uv run watchtower-core plan query closeouts [-h] [--query QUERY] [--initiative-id INITIATIVE_ID] [--project-id PROJECT_ID] [--trace-id TRACE_ID] [--status STATUS] [--terminal-state TERMINAL_STATE] [--promotion-review-required {true,false}] [--limit LIMIT] [--format {human,json}]

entries.summary: Search the coordination index through the machine start-here path for live current planning state.
entries.synopsis: uv run watchtower-core plan query coordination [-h] [--query QUERY] [--trace-id TRACE_ID] [--initiative-status INITIATIVE_STATUS] [--current-phase CURRENT_PHASE] [--owner OWNER] [--blocked-only] [--limit LIMIT] [--format {human,json}]

entries.summary: Search the discrepancy index for drift, validation, and readiness mismatches captured in the live plan workspace.
entries.synopsis: uv run watchtower-core plan query discrepancies [-h] [--query QUERY] [--initiative-id INITIATIVE_ID] [--project-id PROJECT_ID] [--trace-id TRACE_ID] [--category CATEGORY] [--severity SEVERITY] [--status STATUS] [--blocking-only] [--limit LIMIT] [--format {human,json}]

entries.summary: Search the cross-family initiative index for the current phase, active ownership, blockers, and next step of a traced initiative.
entries.synopsis: uv run watchtower-core plan query initiatives [-h] [--query QUERY] [--trace-id TRACE_ID] [--initiative-status INITIATIVE_STATUS] [--current-phase CURRENT_PHASE] [--owner OWNER] [--blocked-only] [--limit LIMIT] [--format {human,json}]

entries.summary: Search the live evidence index for initiative-local validation bundles captured under the plan workspace.
entries.synopsis: uv run watchtower-core plan query plan-evidence [-h] [--query QUERY] [--initiative-id INITIATIVE_ID] [--project-id PROJECT_ID] [--trace-id TRACE_ID] [--status STATUS] [--owner OWNER] [--target-phase TARGET_PHASE] [--validation-type VALIDATION_TYPE] [--acceptance-label ACCEPTANCE_LABEL] [--limit LIMIT] [--format {human,json}]

entries.summary: Load one project-scoped runtime context on top of the always-loaded pack context.
entries.synopsis: uv run watchtower-core plan query project-context [-h] --project-slug PROJECT_SLUG [--format {human,json}]

entries.summary: Search the pack-level project index for project containers and their linked repositories.
entries.synopsis: uv run watchtower-core plan query projects [-h] [--query QUERY] [--project-id PROJECT_ID] [--slug SLUG] [--status STATUS] [--repository-role REPOSITORY_ROLE] [--limit LIMIT] [--format {human,json}]

entries.summary: Search the readiness-gate index for initiative execution readiness.
entries.synopsis: uv run watchtower-core plan query readiness [-h] [--query QUERY] [--initiative-id INITIATIVE_ID] [--project-id PROJECT_ID] [--trace-id TRACE_ID] [--lifecycle-stage LIFECYCLE_STAGE] [--review-status REVIEW_STATUS] [--ready-for-execution {true,false}] [--blocked-only] [--limit LIMIT] [--format {human,json}]

entries.summary: Search the live review index for initiative review state and promotion approval state.
entries.synopsis: uv run watchtower-core plan query reviews [-h] [--query QUERY] [--subject-kind SUBJECT_KIND] [--initiative-id INITIATIVE_ID] [--project-id PROJECT_ID] [--trace-id TRACE_ID] [--review-state REVIEW_STATE] [--ready-for-execution {true,false}] [--review-ref REVIEW_REF] [--limit LIMIT] [--format {human,json}]

entries.summary: Search the live plan task index for initiative-local task records.
entries.synopsis: uv run watchtower-core plan query tasks [-h] [--query QUERY] [--task-id TASK_ID] [--trace-id TRACE_ID] [--task-status TASK_STATUS] [--priority PRIORITY] [--owner OWNER] [--task-kind TASK_KIND] [--blocked-only] [--blocked-by BLOCKED_BY] [--depends-on DEPENDS_ON] [--include-dependency-details] [--limit LIMIT] [--format {human,json}]

entries.summary: Resolve one traceability record by its stable trace identifier.
entries.synopsis: uv run watchtower-core plan query trace [-h] --trace-id TRACE_ID [--format {human,json}]

entries.summary: Rebuild plan-owned derived indexes, trackers, and orchestration slices from authored pack surfaces and live plan machine state.
entries.synopsis: uv run watchtower-core plan sync [-h] <sync_command> ...

entries.summary: Rebuild all plan-owned local deterministic sync surfaces in one run.
entries.synopsis: uv run watchtower-core plan sync all [-h] [--write] [--output-dir OUTPUT_DIR] [--format {human,json}]

entries.summary: Rebuild the deterministic coordination slice for task, traceability, initiative, coordination-index, and compact coordination-tracking surfaces in dependency order.
entries.synopsis: uv run watchtower-core plan sync coordination [-h] [--write] [--output-dir OUTPUT_DIR] [--format {human,json}]

entries.summary: Rebuild the plan-owned foundation index from the governed foundation documents under `core/docs/foundations/`.
entries.synopsis: uv run watchtower-core plan sync foundation-index [-h] [--write] [--output OUTPUT] [--include-document] [--format {human,json}]

entries.summary: Push local-first task records to GitHub in a push-only, local-source model.
entries.synopsis: uv run watchtower-core plan sync github-tasks [-h] [--write] [--repo REPO] [--task-id TASK_ID] [--trace-id TRACE_ID] [--task-status TASK_STATUS] [--priority PRIORITY] [--owner OWNER] [--task-kind TASK_KIND] [--blocked-only] [--blocked-by BLOCKED_BY] [--depends-on DEPENDS_ON] [--project-owner PROJECT_OWNER] [--project-owner-type {user,organization}] [--project-number PROJECT_NUMBER] [--project-status-field PROJECT_STATUS_FIELD] [--no-label-sync] [--token-env TOKEN_ENV] [--format {human,json}]

entries.summary: Rebuild the cross-family initiative index from traceability plus the current planning and task indexes.
entries.synopsis: uv run watchtower-core plan sync initiative-index [-h] [--write] [--output OUTPUT] [--include-document] [--format {human,json}]

entries.summary: Rebuild the human-readable initiative tracker from the governed initiative index.
entries.synopsis: uv run watchtower-core plan sync initiative-tracking [-h] [--write] [--output OUTPUT] [--include-document] [--format {human,json}]

entries.summary: Rebuild the plan-owned reference index from the governed reference documents under `core/docs/references/`.
entries.synopsis: uv run watchtower-core plan sync reference-index [-h] [--write] [--output OUTPUT] [--include-document] [--format {human,json}]

entries.summary: Rebuild the live plan review index from initiative-local review, approval, and readiness state under `plan/**/.wt/`.
entries.synopsis: uv run watchtower-core plan sync review-index [-h] [--write] [--output OUTPUT] [--include-document] [--format {human,json}]

entries.summary: Rebuild the standard index from the governed standards under `core/docs/standards/` and `plan/docs/standards/`.
entries.synopsis: uv run watchtower-core plan sync standard-index [-h] [--write] [--output OUTPUT] [--include-document] [--format {human,json}]

entries.summary: Rebuild the live plan task index from initiative-local task state under `plan/**/.wt/tasks/**`.
entries.synopsis: uv run watchtower-core plan sync task-index [-h] [--write] [--output OUTPUT] [--include-document] [--format {human,json}]

entries.summary: Rebuild the human-readable task tracker from initiative-local live task state under `plan/**/.wt/tasks/**`.
entries.synopsis: uv run watchtower-core plan sync task-tracking [-h] [--write] [--output OUTPUT] [--include-document] [--format {human,json}]

entries.summary: Rebuild the traceability index from the governed planning indexes, acceptance contracts, and validation evidence artifacts.
entries.synopsis: uv run watchtower-core plan sync traceability-index [-h] [--write] [--output OUTPUT] [--include-document] [--format {human,json}]

entries.summary: Rebuild the workflow index from the workflow documents under `core/workflows/modules/`, `core/workflows/roles/`, `plan/workflows/modules/`, and `plan/workflows/roles/`.
entries.synopsis: uv run watchtower-core plan sync workflow-index [-h] [--write] [--output OUTPUT] [--include-document] [--format {human,json}]

entries.summary: Create, update, and transition initiative-local live task records under `plan/**/.wt/tasks/**` while refreshing the derived plan-workspace and coordination surfaces on write.
entries.synopsis: uv run watchtower-core plan task [-h] <task_command> ...

entries.summary: Create one initiative-local live task record from compact structured inputs.
entries.synopsis: uv run watchtower-core plan task create [-h] --task-id TASK_ID [--trace-id TRACE_ID] --title TITLE --summary SUMMARY --task-kind {feature,bug,chore,documentation,governance,research,validation} --priority {critical,high,medium,low} --owner OWNER [--task-status {planned,ready,in_progress,blocked,in_review,completed,cancelled}] --scope SCOPE --done-when DONE_WHEN [--applies-to APPLIES_TO] [--governing-doc GOVERNING_DOC] [--related-id RELATED_ID] [--depends-on DEPENDS_ON] [--blocked-by BLOCKED_BY] [--file-stem FILE_STEM] [--updated-at UPDATED_AT] [--write] [--format {human,json}]

entries.summary: Apply a narrower handoff-style transition over the same governed task lifecycle used by the broader update command.
entries.synopsis: uv run watchtower-core plan task transition [-h] --task-id TASK_ID --task-status {planned,ready,in_progress,blocked,in_review,completed,cancelled} [--next-owner NEXT_OWNER] [--depends-on DEPENDS_ON] [--clear-depends-on] [--blocked-by BLOCKED_BY] [--clear-blocked-by] [--updated-at UPDATED_AT] [--write] [--format {human,json}]

entries.summary: Update one initiative-local live task record without hand-editing the underlying task JSON.
entries.synopsis: uv run watchtower-core plan task update [-h] --task-id TASK_ID [--title TITLE] [--summary SUMMARY] [--task-kind {feature,bug,chore,documentation,governance,research,validation}] [--priority {critical,high,medium,low}] [--owner OWNER] [--task-status {planned,ready,in_progress,blocked,in_review,completed,cancelled}] [--scope SCOPE] [--done-when DONE_WHEN] [--applies-to APPLIES_TO] [--clear-applies-to] [--governing-doc GOVERNING_DOC] [--clear-governing-docs] [--related-id RELATED_ID] [--clear-related-ids] [--depends-on DEPENDS_ON] [--clear-depends-on] [--blocked-by BLOCKED_BY] [--clear-blocked-by] [--updated-at UPDATED_AT] [--write] [--format {human,json}]

entries.summary: Search the governed lookup surfaces without opening the raw JSON artifacts directly.
entries.synopsis: uv run watchtower-core query [-h] <query_command> ...
entries.notes: With no leaf command, this surface prints query-specific help and exits successfully.

entries.summary: Search governed acceptance contracts by trace, source surface path, or acceptance ID.
entries.synopsis: uv run watchtower-core query acceptance [-h] [--trace-id TRACE_ID] [--source-surface-path SOURCE_SURFACE_PATH] [--acceptance-id ACCEPTANCE_ID] [--format {human,json}]

entries.summary: Search the governed authority map for recurring questions about canonical machine surfaces, preferred commands, and fallback human guidance.
entries.synopsis: uv run watchtower-core query authority [-h] [--query QUERY] [--question-id QUESTION_ID] [--domain DOMAIN] [--artifact-kind ARTIFACT_KIND] [--limit LIMIT] [--format {human,json}]

entries.summary: Search the command index for documented repository commands and subcommands.
entries.synopsis: uv run watchtower-core query commands [-h] [--query QUERY] [--kind KIND] [--tag TAG] [--limit LIMIT] [--format {human,json}]

entries.summary: Search governed validation-evidence artifacts by trace, overall result, acceptance ID, or validator ID.
entries.synopsis: uv run watchtower-core query evidence [-h] [--trace-id TRACE_ID] [--result RESULT] [--acceptance-id ACCEPTANCE_ID] [--validator-id VALIDATOR_ID] [--format {human,json}]

entries.summary: Search the governed foundation index for repository intent-layer documents such as design philosophy, product shape, and technology direction.
entries.synopsis: uv run watchtower-core query foundations [-h] [--query QUERY] [--foundation-id FOUNDATION_ID] [--audience AUDIENCE] [--authority AUTHORITY] [--tag TAG] [--related-path RELATED_PATH] [--reference-path REFERENCE_PATH] [--cited-by-path CITED_BY_PATH] [--applied-by-path APPLIED_BY_PATH] [--limit LIMIT] [--format {human,json}]

entries.summary: Search the repository path index by free text or exact filters.
entries.synopsis: uv run watchtower-core query paths [-h] [--query QUERY] [--surface-kind SURFACE_KIND] [--maturity MATURITY] [--priority PRIORITY] [--audience-hint AUDIENCE_HINT] [--tag TAG] [--parent-path PARENT_PATH] [--limit LIMIT] [--format {human,json}]

entries.summary: Search the governed reference index for curated shared-core and pack-owned reference documents plus their upstream authority links.
entries.synopsis: uv run watchtower-core query references [-h] [--query QUERY] [--reference-id REFERENCE_ID] [--repository-status {candidate_future_guidance,supporting_authority,active_support}] [--tag TAG] [--related-path RELATED_PATH] [--upstream-url UPSTREAM_URL] [--cited-by-path CITED_BY_PATH] [--applied-by-path APPLIED_BY_PATH] [--limit LIMIT] [--format {human,json}]

entries.summary: Search the governed standard index for repository standards and best-practice docs.
entries.synopsis: uv run watchtower-core query standards [-h] [--query QUERY] [--standard-id STANDARD_ID] [--category CATEGORY] [--owner OWNER] [--tag TAG] [--applies-to APPLIES_TO] [--related-path RELATED_PATH] [--reference-path REFERENCE_PATH] [--operationalization-mode OPERATIONALIZATION_MODE] [--operationalization-path OPERATIONALIZATION_PATH] [--limit LIMIT] [--format {human,json}]

entries.summary: Search the governed template catalog for reusable document scaffolds, section requirements, allowed roots, and authoring guidance.
entries.synopsis: uv run watchtower-core query templates [-h] [--query QUERY] [--template-id TEMPLATE_ID] [--family-id FAMILY_ID] [--surface-id SURFACE_ID] [--authorship-mode {authored,rendered}] [--llm-guidance-mode {required,advisory,none}] [--allowed-root ALLOWED_ROOT] [--required-section-id REQUIRED_SECTION_ID] [--required-rendered-surface-id REQUIRED_RENDERED_SURFACE_ID] [--limit LIMIT] [--format {human,json}]

entries.summary: Search the governed workflow index for workflow documents and the standards, references, canonical files, or composed modules that govern them.
entries.synopsis: uv run watchtower-core query workflows [-h] [--query QUERY] [--workflow-id WORKFLOW_ID] [--workflow-kind {module,role}] [--phase-type PHASE_TYPE] [--task-family TASK_FAMILY] [--trigger-tag TRIGGER_TAG] [--related-path RELATED_PATH] [--reference-path REFERENCE_PATH] [--limit LIMIT] [--format {human,json}]

entries.summary: Run local release-gate commands that combine broad repository validation, explicit schema-definition validation, dirty-worktree protection, and curated export staging.
entries.synopsis: uv run watchtower-core release [-h] <release_command> ...

entries.summary: Run the local fail-closed release gate for one intended handoff bundle.
entries.synopsis: uv run watchtower-core release check [-h] --output-root OUTPUT_ROOT [--include-pack INCLUDE_PACK] [--pack-only] [--schema-path SCHEMA_PATH] [--allow-dirty] [--overwrite] [--pack-settings-path PACK_SETTINGS_PATH] [--format {human,json}]

entries.summary: Preview the workflow documents that the current routing surfaces would activate for a request.
entries.synopsis: uv run watchtower-core route [-h] <route_command> ...

entries.summary: Preview the workflow-document route selected by the current routing data.
entries.synopsis: uv run watchtower-core route preview [-h] (--request REQUEST | --task-type TASK_TYPE) [--format {human,json}]

entries.summary: Rebuild reusable-core derived governed artifacts from authored repository sources.
entries.synopsis: uv run watchtower-core sync [-h] <sync_command> ...
entries.notes: With no leaf command, this surface prints sync-specific help and exits successfully.

entries.summary: Rebuild the command index from the registry-backed CLI parser metadata while keeping the human-readable companion pages under `core/docs/commands/` for shared commands and the owning pack docs root for pack-native commands.
entries.synopsis: uv run watchtower-core sync command-index [-h] [--write] [--output OUTPUT] [--include-document] [--format {human,json}]

entries.summary: Rebuild the repository path index from README inventory tables.
entries.synopsis: uv run watchtower-core sync repository-paths [-h] [--write] [--output OUTPUT] [--include-document] [--format {human,json}]
entries.notes: Runs in dry-run mode by default and only writes when --write or --output is provided.

entries.summary: Rebuild the route index from `core/workflows/ROUTING_TABLE.md` plus any pack-owned routing tables.
entries.synopsis: uv run watchtower-core sync route-index [-h] [--write] [--output OUTPUT] [--include-document] [--format {human,json}]

entries.summary: Run validation commands against governed repository artifacts and document surfaces.
entries.synopsis: uv run watchtower-core validate [-h] <validate_command> ...
entries.notes: With no leaf command, this surface prints validate-specific help and exits successfully.

entries.summary: Validate one traced initiative across trace-level acceptance IDs, acceptance contracts, validation evidence, validator references, source-surface links, and the traceability index.
entries.synopsis: uv run watchtower-core validate acceptance [-h] --trace-id TRACE_ID [--format {human,json}]

entries.summary: Run the current explicit validation families across the governed repository surfaces in deterministic order.
entries.synopsis: uv run watchtower-core validate all [-h] [--skip-front-matter] [--skip-document-semantics] [--skip-artifacts] [--skip-acceptance] [--pack-settings-path PACK_SETTINGS_PATH] [--format {human,json}]

entries.summary: Validate one governed JSON artifact against the active schema-backed validators published in the control plane.
entries.synopsis: uv run watchtower-core validate artifact [-h] --path PATH [--validator-id VALIDATOR_ID | --schema-id SCHEMA_ID] [--supplemental-schema-path SUPPLEMENTAL_SCHEMA_PATH] [--pack-settings-path PACK_SETTINGS_PATH] [--format {human,json}] [--record-evidence] [--trace-id TRACE_ID] [--evidence-id EVIDENCE_ID] [--subject-id SUBJECT_ID] [--acceptance-id ACCEPTANCE_ID] [--evidence-output EVIDENCE_OUTPUT] [--traceability-output TRACEABILITY_OUTPUT]
entries.notes: Can optionally write durable validation evidence and a synchronized traceability update when --record-evidence is used.

entries.summary: Validate one governed Markdown document against the repository's semantic document rules, such as required sections, section order, applied-reference explanation rules, and family-specific guardrails.
entries.synopsis: uv run watchtower-core validate document-semantics [-h] --path PATH [--validator-id VALIDATOR_ID] [--pack-settings-path PACK_SETTINGS_PATH] [--format {human,json}] [--record-evidence] [--trace-id TRACE_ID] [--evidence-id EVIDENCE_ID] [--subject-id SUBJECT_ID] [--acceptance-id ACCEPTANCE_ID] [--evidence-output EVIDENCE_OUTPUT] [--traceability-output TRACEABILITY_OUTPUT]

entries.summary: Validate one Markdown document front-matter block against the governed front-matter profiles published in the control plane.
entries.synopsis: uv run watchtower-core validate front-matter [-h] --path PATH [--validator-id VALIDATOR_ID] [--pack-settings-path PACK_SETTINGS_PATH] [--format {human,json}] [--record-evidence] [--trace-id TRACE_ID] [--evidence-id EVIDENCE_ID] [--subject-id SUBJECT_ID] [--acceptance-id ACCEPTANCE_ID] [--evidence-output EVIDENCE_OUTPUT] [--traceability-output TRACEABILITY_OUTPUT]
entries.notes: Can optionally write durable validation evidence and a synchronized traceability update when --record-evidence is used.

entries.summary: Validate one repository root or staged export against the customer-release and customer-bootstrap portability contract.
entries.synopsis: uv run watchtower-core validate portability [-h] [--root ROOT] [--include-pack INCLUDE_PACK] [--pack-only] [--engineering-core] [--format {human,json}]

entries.summary: Validate one JSON Schema definition file against the Draft 2020-12 metaschema.
entries.synopsis: uv run watchtower-core validate schema [-h] --path PATH [--format {human,json}] [--record-evidence] [--trace-id TRACE_ID] [--evidence-id EVIDENCE_ID] [--subject-id SUBJECT_ID] [--acceptance-id ACCEPTANCE_ID] [--evidence-output EVIDENCE_OUTPUT] [--traceability-output TRACEABILITY_OUTPUT]

entries.summary: Run one validation suite declared in the active validation-suite registry for the selected pack settings surface.
entries.synopsis: uv run watchtower-core validate suite [-h] --suite-id SUITE_ID [--pack-settings-path PACK_SETTINGS_PATH] [--format {human,json}]
